steps.observed: Page loaded with Single Token Price form, chain selector, etc.

steps.action: Clear token address field and type 'DAI'
steps.observed: Dropdown appeared showing 'DAI — Dai Stablecoin (0x6B17...1d0F)' with 'Uniswap Labs Default' source
Dropdown disappeared, only empty input field visible

assertions.title: Search matches symbol, name, and address

steps.observed: Dropdown showed 'DAI — Dai Stablecoin (0x6B17...1d0F)' matching by name

steps.expected: Tokens matching by address prefix appear
steps.observed: Dropdown showed 'USDC — USDCoin (0xA0b8...eB48)' matching by address prefix

assertions.issues: Note: The validation contract example uses 'USD Coin' (with space) for name search, but the actual tokenlist entry name is 'USDCoin' (no space). Name search works correctly with the actual name 'Dai Stablecoin'. This is a data discrepancy in the contract, not a code bug.

steps.observed: Dropdown showed 'WETH — Wrapped Ether (0xC02a...6Cc2)' — Ethereum WETH address
Dropdown showed 'WETH — Wrapped Ether (0x82aF...Bab1)' — Arbitrum WETH address (different from Ethereum)

steps.expected: Suggestion shows 'SYMBOL — Name (0xaddr...)' with source tokenlist name in small/muted text
steps.observed: Dropdown showed 'WETH — Wrapped Ether (0x82aF...Bab1)' on first line, 'Uniswap Labs Default' in smaller muted text below

assertions.title: Selecting a suggestion fills the address

steps.action: Type 'WETH' to open dropdown, then click 'WETH — Wrapped Ether' suggestion
steps.expected: Input filled with full token address and dropdown closes
steps.observed: Input filled with '0x82aF49447D8a07e3bd95BD0d56f35241523fBab1' (full address), dropdown closed

steps.action: With Ethereum selected, type 'USDC' — see Ethereum USDC (0xA0b8...eB48)
Switch chain to Arbitrum while 'USDC' is in the field, trigger re-evaluation
steps.expected: Dropdown updates to show Arbitrum tokens
steps.observed: Dropdown showed Arbitrum-specific results: USDC — USDCoin (0xaf88...5831) and USDC.e — Bridged USDC (0xFF97...5CC8)
Showed WETH — Wrapped Ether (0x82aF...Bab1) — Arbitrum address

steps.action: Select WETH from autocomplete and click Get Price
steps.observed: Price result returned: Chain=arbitrum, Token=0x82aF49447D8a07e3bd95BD0d56f35241523fBab1, Price=1991.36228661, Block=437804297

frictions.description: The token address input has a pre-filled DAI address on page load. Typing appends to it rather than replacing. Must explicitly clear the field before typing a new search term.
frictions.resolution: Used fill(@ref, '') to clear the field before typing new search terms

frictions.description: The accessibility snapshot sometimes returns '(no interactive elements)' after certain interactions, requiring a page reload to recover. Happened 3 times during testing.
frictions.resolution: Reloaded the page via agent-browser open http://localhost:8000 to restore the DOM state

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. Autocomplete triggers on typing, matches by symbol/name/address, filters by selected chain, shows correct format (SYMBOL — Name (0xaddr...) with source label), fills address on selection, updates when chain is switched, and correctly routes price requests to the selected chain's endpoint. No console errors observed.
